question: How does spend split between serverless and classic compute?
What are our top optimization recommendations by savings?
How much did we pay for failed job runs in the last 30 days?
Rank all teams by efficiency score from best to worst.
Which clusters are 2 or more DBR LTS versions behind, and what is the upgrade SLA?
Which unused tables can we de-commission, and which need predictive optimization?
What did we spend in the last 30 days, broken down by line of business?
Which clusters run below 15% average CPU and how much do they cost?
Which teams have the most addressable savings?
Which SQL warehouses never auto-stop (policy violation), and what should they be set to?
What should our highest-spend team fix first, and how much would it save?
Where is the biggest savings opportunity, by lever (reduce waste / rightsize / optimize)?
Which jobs are running on all-purpose compute instead of job compute?
What is our spend by SKU over the last 90 days?
Which teams are wasting the most money, and what is the waste made of?
Which teams are below our efficiency-score target and need a FinOps review?
What are the top optimization recommendations across the estate, with estimated savings?
Show the daily spend trend for the last 90 days by compute type.
How much are we losing to idle SQL warehouses, by team?

content: OPTIMIZATION-FIRST: this space leads with actionable, team-tagged recommendations across three levers - Reduce waste (idle clusters/warehouses, failing jobs, unused/zombie warehouses, over-frequent jobs, de-commission unused tables), Rightsize infra (oversized warehouses, right-size VM/instance, jobs-on-all-purpose, spot, autoscaling), and Optimize data & code (high query spill, outdated runtime, enable predictive optimization, compact small files - route code/query tuning to the Genie + Assistant). For 'what should team X fix' or 'biggest savings', compute the relevant signal grouped by team (lob/sub_division/team) and order by estimated monthly savings. This Genie space answers FinOps questions (cost, waste, compute efficiency, policy) for a Databricks estate using ONLY Databricks system tables (no views, no materialized tables).Conventions: money is USD = usage_quantity * list_prices.pricing.default (join system.billing.list_prices on sku_name + usage_unit with usage_end_time within [price_start_time, price_end_time)). Default the window to the last 30 days; for relative windows use only a lower bound (usage_date >= date_add(current_date(),-N)); usage data has no future dates.Org hierarchy: Line of Business (lob) > Sub-division > Team > Workspace. Derive lob/sub_division/team/environment from system.billing.usage.custom_tags (e.g. custom_tags['lob']); coalesce missing to 'Untagged'. See the org CTE in the example SQLs.Waste = idle compute cost + warehouse idle cost + failed-job cost. Efficiency score is spend-relative: 100 - waste/spend% (higher is better). Idle cluster cost ~ cost * (1 - min(avg_cpu,50)/50) using system.compute.node_timeline. Idle warehouse cost ~ cost * (1 - query_exec_seconds/running_seconds) from system.compute.warehouse_events + system.query.history. Jobs-on-all-purpose: system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline.compute_ids joined to system.compute.clusters where cluster_source not in ('JOB').Key tables: system.billing.usage (+ list_prices) for spend; system.compute.clusters/node_timeline for cluster util; system.compute.warehouses/warehouse_events + system.query.history for warehouse idle/spills; system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline/jobs for jobs. The example SQLs below show the exact join patterns - follow them.POLICY (example - adjust): cluster auto_termination_minutes <= 15 (prod)/10 (dev); SQL warehouse auto-stop <= 10 min, never-auto-stop is a violation; spot-with-fallback on eligible batch; DBR within 2 LTS; scheduled jobs on job compute not all-purpose; efficiency target >= 80, waste <= 10% of spend.SCOPE: answer cost/spend/waste/efficiency/optimization/policy. Decline per-query/per-statement cost and cloud VM/storage cost (not in DBU billing) and point to Query History / the cloud cost tool.

question: What are the top optimization recommendations, with estimated savings?
sql:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),
priced AS (
  SELECT u.usage_date, date_trunc('MONTH',u.usage_date) AS usage_month, u.workspace_id,
    o.workspace_name, o.lob, o.sub_division, o.team, o.environment, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product,
    CASE WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Job Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'Lakeflow / DLT'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
         ELSE 'Platform / Other' END AS compute_type,
    u.usage_metadata.cluster_id AS cluster_id, u.usage_metadata.job_id AS job_id, u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_quantity * try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id
  LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit
       AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time)
  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
),
cl_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
node_util AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,date(start_time) d, avg(cpu_user_percent+cpu_system_percent) avg_cpu_pct, avg(mem_used_percent) avg_mem_pct, max(mem_used_percent) peak_mem_pct, count(*) node_minutes FROM system.compute.node_timeline WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE cluster_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment,
    coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id) cluster_id,
    cl.cluster_name, cl.cluster_source, coalesce(nu.d,cc.d) d,
    nu.avg_cpu_pct, nu.avg_mem_pct, nu.peak_mem_pct, nu.node_minutes, coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0) cost_usd, cl.dbr_version,
    greatest(0, 17 - try_cast(split(regexp_extract(cl.dbr_version,'(\\d+\\.\\d+)',1),'\\.')[0] AS INT)) major_versions_behind,
    (cl.aws_attributes.availability LIKE 'SPOT%') is_spot, cl.auto_termination_minutes, cl.min_autoscale_workers, cl.max_autoscale_workers,
    CASE WHEN nu.avg_cpu_pct IS NOT NULL THEN coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(nu.avg_cpu_pct,50)/50.0) ELSE 0 END idle_cpu_cost_usd
  FROM node_util nu FULL OUTER JOIN clu_cost cc USING (workspace_id,cluster_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN cl_latest cl ON cl.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) AND cl.cluster_id=coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id)
),
wh_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,workspace_id,warehouse_name,warehouse_type,warehouse_size,min_clusters,max_clusters,auto_stop_minutes, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.warehouses) WHERE rn=1),
wh_ev AS (SELECT warehouse_id,date(event_time) d, sum(CASE WHEN event_type NOT IN ('STOPPED','STOPPING') THEN timestampdiff(SECOND,event_time,next_time) ELSE 0 END) running_seconds FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,event_type,event_time, lead(event_time) OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY event_time) next_time FROM system.compute.warehouse_events WHERE event_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS) WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL AND date(event_time)=date(next_time) GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_q AS (SELECT compute.warehouse_id warehouse_id,date(start_time) d, count(*) query_count, sum(execution_duration_ms)/1000.0 exec_seconds, sum(spilled_local_bytes)/1e9 spilled_gb, sum(CASE WHEN execution_status='FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed_queries FROM system.query.history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_cost AS (SELECT warehouse_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE warehouse_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
whe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, wl.workspace_id, c.warehouse_id, wl.warehouse_name, wl.warehouse_type, wl.warehouse_size,
    wl.auto_stop_minutes, (coalesce(wl.auto_stop_minutes,0)=0) never_auto_stops, c.d, coalesce(c.cost_usd,0) cost_usd,
    e.running_seconds, q.query_count, q.exec_seconds, coalesce(q.spilled_gb,0) spilled_gb, coalesce(q.failed_queries,0) failed_queries,
    least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0)) utilization,
    coalesce(c.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0))) idle_cost_usd
  FROM wh_cost c LEFT JOIN wh_ev e ON e.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND e.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_q q ON q.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND q.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_latest wl ON wl.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=wl.workspace_id
),
job_cl AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source FROM (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
job_runs AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,run_id,date(period_start_time) d,result_state,compute_ids FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline WHERE period_start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS),
job_apc AS (SELECT r.workspace_id,r.job_id,r.d,r.run_id, max(CASE WHEN coalesce(c.cluster_source,'') NOT IN ('JOB','') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) used_apc, max(CASE WHEN r.result_state IN ('FAILED','ERROR','TIMED_OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed FROM job_runs r LEFT JOIN LATERAL explode(r.compute_ids) AS t(cid) LEFT JOIN job_cl c ON c.workspace_id=r.workspace_id AND c.cluster_id=t.cid GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
job_day AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,d, count(*) runs, sum(failed) failed_runs, max(used_apc) ran_on_apc FROM job_apc GROUP BY 1,2,3),
job_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) job_cost_usd FROM priced WHERE job_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
jobe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(jd.job_id,jc.job_id) job_id, coalesce(jd.d,jc.d) d,
    coalesce(jd.runs,0) runs, coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0) failed_runs, coalesce(jd.ran_on_apc,0) ran_on_apc, coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) job_cost_usd,
    CASE WHEN coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0)>0 THEN coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) ELSE 0 END failed_cost_usd
  FROM job_day jd FULL OUTER JOIN job_cost jc USING (workspace_id,job_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id)
)
SELECT *, CASE WHEN est_monthly_savings>=5000 THEN 'High' WHEN est_monthly_savings>=500 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END severity FROM (
    SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,workspace_id,'Underutilized compute' category,'Right-size or enable autoscaling on clusters averaging low CPU' recommendation, round(sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd)) est_monthly_savings, concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' clusters, avg CPU ',round(avg(avg_cpu_pct),0),'%') detail FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND avg_cpu_pct<30 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 HAVING sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd)>50
    UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,workspace_id,'Idle warehouses','Lower auto-stop and consolidate under-used SQL warehouses', round(sum(idle_cost_usd)), concat(count(DISTINCT warehouse_id),' warehouses, avg util ',round(avg(utilization)*100,0),'%') FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 HAVING sum(idle_cost_usd)>50
    UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,workspace_id,'Failing jobs','Fix recurring job failures so you stop paying for failed runs', round(sum(failed_cost_usd)), concat(sum(failed_runs),' failed runs in 30d') FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 HAVING sum(failed_cost_usd)>25
    UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,workspace_id,'Jobs on all-purpose compute','Move scheduled jobs from all-purpose to job compute (~50% cheaper DBUs)', round(sum(CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_cost_usd ELSE 0 END)*0.5), concat(count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_id END),' jobs on all-purpose') FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 HAVING sum(CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_cost_usd ELSE 0 END)>50
    UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,workspace_id,'Outdated runtime','Upgrade clusters to the latest DBR LTS for performance + cost gains', 0, concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' clusters >=2 majors behind') FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND major_versions_behind>=2 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 HAVING count(DISTINCT cluster_id)>0)

question: How does spend split between serverless and classic compute over the last 90 days?
sql: SELECT u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, round(sum(u.usage_quantity*try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double))) cost_usd FROM system.billing.usage u LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time) WHERE u.usage_date>=current_date()-90 GROUP BY 1

question: What did we spend in the last 30 days by line of business?
sql:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
) SELECT o.lob, round(sum(u.usage_quantity*try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double))) cost_usd FROM system.billing.usage u JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time) WHERE u.usage_date>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cost_usd DESC

question: What is our spend by SKU over the last 90 days?
sql: SELECT u.sku_name, round(sum(u.usage_quantity*try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double))) cost_usd FROM system.billing.usage u LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time) WHERE u.usage_date>=current_date()-90 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 25

question: Which teams are wasting the most money?
sql:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),
priced AS (
  SELECT u.usage_date, date_trunc('MONTH',u.usage_date) AS usage_month, u.workspace_id,
    o.workspace_name, o.lob, o.sub_division, o.team, o.environment, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product,
    CASE WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Job Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'Lakeflow / DLT'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
         ELSE 'Platform / Other' END AS compute_type,
    u.usage_metadata.cluster_id AS cluster_id, u.usage_metadata.job_id AS job_id, u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_quantity * try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id
  LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit
       AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time)
  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
),
cl_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
node_util AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,date(start_time) d, avg(cpu_user_percent+cpu_system_percent) avg_cpu_pct, avg(mem_used_percent) avg_mem_pct, max(mem_used_percent) peak_mem_pct, count(*) node_minutes FROM system.compute.node_timeline WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE cluster_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment,
    coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id) cluster_id,
    cl.cluster_name, cl.cluster_source, coalesce(nu.d,cc.d) d,
    nu.avg_cpu_pct, nu.avg_mem_pct, nu.peak_mem_pct, nu.node_minutes, coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0) cost_usd, cl.dbr_version,
    greatest(0, 17 - try_cast(split(regexp_extract(cl.dbr_version,'(\\d+\\.\\d+)',1),'\\.')[0] AS INT)) major_versions_behind,
    (cl.aws_attributes.availability LIKE 'SPOT%') is_spot, cl.auto_termination_minutes, cl.min_autoscale_workers, cl.max_autoscale_workers,
    CASE WHEN nu.avg_cpu_pct IS NOT NULL THEN coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(nu.avg_cpu_pct,50)/50.0) ELSE 0 END idle_cpu_cost_usd
  FROM node_util nu FULL OUTER JOIN clu_cost cc USING (workspace_id,cluster_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN cl_latest cl ON cl.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) AND cl.cluster_id=coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id)
),
wh_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,workspace_id,warehouse_name,warehouse_type,warehouse_size,min_clusters,max_clusters,auto_stop_minutes, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.warehouses) WHERE rn=1),
wh_ev AS (SELECT warehouse_id,date(event_time) d, sum(CASE WHEN event_type NOT IN ('STOPPED','STOPPING') THEN timestampdiff(SECOND,event_time,next_time) ELSE 0 END) running_seconds FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,event_type,event_time, lead(event_time) OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY event_time) next_time FROM system.compute.warehouse_events WHERE event_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS) WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL AND date(event_time)=date(next_time) GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_q AS (SELECT compute.warehouse_id warehouse_id,date(start_time) d, count(*) query_count, sum(execution_duration_ms)/1000.0 exec_seconds, sum(spilled_local_bytes)/1e9 spilled_gb, sum(CASE WHEN execution_status='FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed_queries FROM system.query.history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_cost AS (SELECT warehouse_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE warehouse_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
whe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, wl.workspace_id, c.warehouse_id, wl.warehouse_name, wl.warehouse_type, wl.warehouse_size,
    wl.auto_stop_minutes, (coalesce(wl.auto_stop_minutes,0)=0) never_auto_stops, c.d, coalesce(c.cost_usd,0) cost_usd,
    e.running_seconds, q.query_count, q.exec_seconds, coalesce(q.spilled_gb,0) spilled_gb, coalesce(q.failed_queries,0) failed_queries,
    least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0)) utilization,
    coalesce(c.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0))) idle_cost_usd
  FROM wh_cost c LEFT JOIN wh_ev e ON e.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND e.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_q q ON q.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND q.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_latest wl ON wl.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=wl.workspace_id
),
job_cl AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source FROM (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
job_runs AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,run_id,date(period_start_time) d,result_state,compute_ids FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline WHERE period_start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS),
job_apc AS (SELECT r.workspace_id,r.job_id,r.d,r.run_id, max(CASE WHEN coalesce(c.cluster_source,'') NOT IN ('JOB','') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) used_apc, max(CASE WHEN r.result_state IN ('FAILED','ERROR','TIMED_OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed FROM job_runs r LEFT JOIN LATERAL explode(r.compute_ids) AS t(cid) LEFT JOIN job_cl c ON c.workspace_id=r.workspace_id AND c.cluster_id=t.cid GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
job_day AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,d, count(*) runs, sum(failed) failed_runs, max(used_apc) ran_on_apc FROM job_apc GROUP BY 1,2,3),
job_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) job_cost_usd FROM priced WHERE job_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
jobe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(jd.job_id,jc.job_id) job_id, coalesce(jd.d,jc.d) d,
    coalesce(jd.runs,0) runs, coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0) failed_runs, coalesce(jd.ran_on_apc,0) ran_on_apc, coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) job_cost_usd,
    CASE WHEN coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0)>0 THEN coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) ELSE 0 END failed_cost_usd
  FROM job_day jd FULL OUTER JOIN job_cost jc USING (workspace_id,job_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id)
),
sc_spend AS (SELECT workspace_id, usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) spend FROM priced WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 60 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
sc_ic AS (SELECT workspace_id,d,sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd) v FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-INTERVAL 60 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
sc_wi AS (SELECT workspace_id,d,sum(idle_cost_usd) v FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-INTERVAL 60 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
sc_jf AS (SELECT workspace_id,d,sum(failed_cost_usd) failed_v, sum(CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_cost_usd ELSE 0 END) apc_v FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-INTERVAL 60 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
sc_daily AS (SELECT coalesce(s.workspace_id,ic.workspace_id,wi.workspace_id,j.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(s.d,ic.d,wi.d,j.d) d, coalesce(s.spend,0) spend, coalesce(ic.v,0) idle_cpu_cost, coalesce(wi.v,0) wh_idle_cost, coalesce(j.failed_v,0) failed_cost, coalesce(j.apc_v,0) jobs_on_apc_cost FROM sc_spend s FULL OUTER JOIN sc_ic ic USING(workspace_id,d) FULL OUTER JOIN sc_wi wi USING(workspace_id,d) FULL OUTER JOIN sc_jf j USING(workspace_id,d)),
sc_agg AS (SELECT workspace_id, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN spend END) spend_cur, sum(CASE WHEN d<current_date()-30 THEN spend END) spend_prev, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN idle_cpu_cost+wh_idle_cost+failed_cost END) waste_cur, sum(CASE WHEN d<current_date()-30 THEN idle_cpu_cost+wh_idle_cost+failed_cost END) waste_prev, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN idle_cpu_cost END) idle_cpu_cost, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN wh_idle_cost END) wh_idle_cost, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN failed_cost END) failed_cost, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN jobs_on_apc_cost END) jobs_on_apc_cost FROM sc_daily GROUP BY 1),
sc_scored AS (SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,a.workspace_id, round(coalesce(a.spend_cur,0)) total_spend, round(coalesce(a.idle_cpu_cost,0)) idle_cpu_cost, round(coalesce(a.wh_idle_cost,0)) wh_idle_cost, round(coalesce(a.failed_cost,0)) failed_cost, round(coalesce(a.jobs_on_apc_cost,0)) jobs_on_apc_cost, round(coalesce(a.waste_cur,0)) total_waste, round(100*coalesce(a.waste_cur,0)/nullif(a.spend_cur,0),1) waste_pct, round(100*(1-least(1,coalesce(a.waste_cur,0)/nullif(a.spend_cur,0))),1) efficiency_score, round(100*(1-least(1,coalesce(a.waste_prev,0)/nullif(a.spend_prev,0))),1) prior_efficiency_score FROM sc_agg a LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=a.workspace_id WHERE coalesce(a.spend_cur,0)>0),
scard AS (SELECT *, round(efficiency_score-prior_efficiency_score,1) score_delta, rank() OVER (ORDER BY efficiency_score DESC) rank_efficiency, rank() OVER (ORDER BY total_waste DESC) rank_waste, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY lob ORDER BY efficiency_score DESC) rank_in_lob FROM sc_scored)
SELECT lob, sub_division, team, workspace_name, total_spend, total_waste, waste_pct, efficiency_score, score_delta, idle_cpu_cost, wh_idle_cost, failed_cost, jobs_on_apc_cost, rank_efficiency, rank_waste FROM scard

question: Show the daily spend trend for the last 90 days by compute type.
sql:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
) SELECT u.usage_date, CASE WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose' WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Jobs' WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL' WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'DLT' ELSE 'Other' END compute_type, round(sum(u.usage_quantity*try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double))) cost_usd FROM system.billing.usage u JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time) WHERE u.usage_date>=current_date()-90 GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1
